task_description: Rebuild the GeoUMKM Intelligence 3.0 Jupyter notebooks from scratch. Replace 6 flawed notebooks (circular logic, fake geography, no proper ML) with 8 professional notebooks targeting Bank, Government, and Investor stakeholders. Use real Jawa Barat geography (627 kecamatan), proper ML pipelines (XGBoost, LightGBM, SHAP), credit risk modeling, clustering, recommendation engine, what-if simulation, and LLM/RIG preparation.

verification.summary: All 8 notebooks execute end-to-end without errors. All expected output files generated: 15 CSV files, 1 JSON file in data/, 6 JSON files in data/knowledge_base/, 2 model files in models/. README.md and index.html updated to reflect new 8-notebook structure with no references to old notebooks remaining.
